name: Funfetti Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine cake mix, flour, oil, and egg whites. Mix well.
3. Stir in sprinkles from the cake mix.
4. Shape dough into one-inch balls.
5. Place two inches apart on prepared baking sheets.
6. Flatten each ball with the bottom of a glass dipped in flour to 1/4 inch thickness.
7. Bake for 8 minutes or until edges are light brown.
8. Cool completely.
9. Spread frosting over cookies.
10. Immediately top each cookie with a few sprinkles.
11. Allow frosting to set before storing.
